# dead-code-hunter Architecture Docs

## Entitys
- [ActionRunner — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/subdomain-actionrunner.html): Handles the main execution loop and SDK initialization Architecture documentation for the ActionRunner subdomain (part of GitHubAction domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [DeadCodeAnalysis Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/domain-deadcodeanalysis.html): Core logic for processing, filtering, and evaluating dead code candidates Architectural overview of the DeadCodeAnalysis domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [GitHubAction Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/domain-githubaction.html): The entry point and orchestration layer for the GitHub Actions environment Architectural overview of the GitHubAction domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 5 source files.
- [Inputs — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/subdomain-inputs.html): Parses user configurations from the action.yml metadata Architecture documentation for the Inputs subdomain (part of GitHubAction domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [MarkdownReporter Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/domain-markdownreporter.html): Utility layer for generating valid Markdown for GitHub comments Architectural overview of the MarkdownReporter domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [SupermodelSDK Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/domain-supermodelsdk.html): External integration for deep graph-based static analysis Architectural overview of the SupermodelSDK domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
